# isSuperset(of:)

**Type Method**

Matches when the code signing flags on the file/slice are a superset of the specified flags.

## Declaration

```swift
static func isSuperset(of: OnDiskCodeSigningFlags.DataType) -> OnDiskCodeSigningFlags.OutType
```
title: isSuperset(of:)
